name: File Encryption Plugin
description: Transparent encryption/decryption for config and memory files.

encryptionKey.description: AES-256 encryption key (base64 encoded, 32 bytes). Use OPENCLAW_FILE_ENCRYPTION_KEY env var for security.

encryptedPaths.description: File path patterns to encrypt (supports * wildcard). Default: ['**/memory/**', '**/.openclaw/config.*']

mode.description: Operation mode: 'encrypt' encrypts on write, 'decrypt' decrypts on read, 'both' does both.
